name: Hijack Execution Flow via PATH Interception
description: Detects potential PATH variable manipulation for execution flow hijacking
query:
// Detect PATH environment variable manipulation
// Trigger on PATH modification to insert malicious directories
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(setx.*PATH|\$env:path|export\s+PATH=)"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(\\temp|\\tmp|appdata|/tmp|/dev/shm)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
